task_completion.description: Verify the 'Pending E-Waste' status label was created with the 'Undeployable' type.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a status label named exactly 'Pending E-Waste' in the Status Labels settings or list, showing its type as 'Undeployable'.

task_completion.description: Verify that EOL laptops (purchased before 2022-06-01) have been checked in from their users.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the asset list or history showing the old laptops (Purchase Date before 2022-06-01) are no longer checked out to users (e.g., check-in confirmation banners or an empty 'Checked Out To' column for these specific assets).

task_completion.description: Verify that the reclaimed EOL laptops have their status updated to 'Pending E-Waste'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the asset list showing the old laptops (Purchase Date before 2022-06-01) with the status explicitly set to 'Pending E-Waste'.

task_completion.description: Verify that replacement laptops from the 'Ready to Deploy' pool were checked out to the users who had their EOL laptops reclaimed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for checkout confirmations or the asset list showing new laptops (which were previously 'Ready to Deploy') now checked out to the affected users.

task_completion.description: Verify that laptops purchased on or after 2022-06-01 were NOT modified.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for laptops with purchase dates >= 2022-06-01 in the asset list; they should still be checked out to their original users and must NOT have the 'Pending E-Waste' status.

task_completion.description: Verify that assets in categories other than 'Laptops' were NOT modified.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for non-laptop assets (e.g., Monitors) in the asset list; their status and checkout state should remain completely unchanged.

integrity.description: The agent used the web interface to perform the actions.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the web application (Snipe-IT) in a browser being interacted with, not terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent actually modified the assets in the system rather than typing the expected answers into a text file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Changes should be visible within the application's asset tables, status label lists, or action confirmation banners.

integrity.description: The agent did not use direct database queries to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of terminal windows showing SQL commands (like MySQL/SQLite CLI) updating the assets table directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target category is 'Laptops'. EOL date threshold is '2022-06-01' (assets purchased before this date are EOL). The expected status label is exactly 'Pending E-Waste' with the type 'undeployable'. Assets purchased on or after 2022-06-01, or assets in other categories (like Monitors), must remain untouched.
